description: Pooled load identities: a basic call whose From/To walk a binding pool with per-call ${seq}/${rand:N} expansion, and whose extras override the run's global dwells per call (ring 25 ms, talk 10 ms). Attach with `loadgen --scenario basic_call=4,case=e2e/cases/load-basic-pooled.json` (or the global `--case`).
